design: cell×month two-way fixed-effects panel: Δlog(violations)_{t→t+1} ~ β·exposure_std_t + cell FE + month FE; SE cluster-robust by cell
beta_interpretation: change in log next-month violations per +1 SD of this-month enforcement exposure, within cell, net of month shocks
lead_note: effect of NEXT month's exposure on this transition's change; ≈0 supports parallel pre-trends / no anticipation
parallel_trends_note: only ~5 monthly transitions exist (Nov 2023–Apr 2024; Apr partial), so formal pre-trend testing is limited — we report a lead-exposure placebo as the trend diagnostic
caveat: Estimated from TICKET data: this is enforcement→future-violation responsiveness, NOT parking→congestion. β<0 mixes deterrence with mean-reversion and is not a clean causal effect without exogeneity.

congestion_causal.plan: cell×slot fixed-effects of MEASURED CongestionSeverity (live Mappls ETA) on parking intensity + event study around enforcement clearances, with placebo dates — drops in here once the route/ETA API is enabled
congestion_causal.today: route/ETA API blocked (product not enabled / quota); not faked
